title: Tasty Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A mustardy and creamy Jamaican dish featuring rice-syrup-jocheong, perfect for a sick day, and a fodmap-friendly option for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the pan.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice syrup, jocheong, coconut milk, mustard, salt, and black pepper to the pan.
Stir to combine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pan and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the chicken and sauce over rice or with naan bread.
